title: Classic Loki
content:
{{Otheruses|Loki}} {{CharHub|Classic Loki|Loki}} {{AltUniverse|the "[[Statesman Survivor Loki Universe|''Statesman'' Survivor Loki]]"|3=Characters|4=1}} {{Character |image = Classic Loki Character Poster.jpg |real name = Loki {{ConjecNameAU|Laufeyson}}This character's surname is derived from a Variant from ''[[Thor: The Dark World Prelude|Thor: The Dark World Prelude, Issue 2]]'' and thus is conjecturally treated as the same.{{Ref|LK105}} |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Classic Loki{{Ref|LK105}}}} |species = [[Frost Giant]] |gender = Fluid[[:File:Loki Promo File.jpeg|Loki's TVA File]] |citizenship = [[Jotunheim|Jotun]] (formerly)
{{Citizenship|ASG2}} (formerly) |DOD = [[Void (End of Time)|End of Time]]{{Ref|LK105}} |title = Prince of Asgard (formerly)
King of Asgard (formerly) |affiliation = {{Affiliation|ASG2SSL}} (formerly)
[[Kid Loki's Crew]] |tv series = ''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]'' (2 episodes) |docuseries = ''[[Legends]]''
*''[[Variants]]'' |actor = [[Richard E. Grant]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|We lie and we cheat, we cut the throat of every person who trusts us, and for what? Power. Glorious power. Glorious purpose! We cannot change. We're broken, every version of us. Forever.|Classic Loki to [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]|Journey Into Mystery}} '''Loki {{ConjecNameAU|Laufeyson}}''' was a former member of the [[Asgardian Royal Family/Statesman Survivor Loki|Asgardian Royal Family]] who survived [[Thanos/Statesman Survivor Loki|Thanos]]' [[Attack on the Statesman/Statesman Survivor Loki|assault]] on the ''[[Statesman]]''. In the aftermath of the attack, Classic Loki lived on an isolated planet for centuries before attempting to reunite with [[Thor/Statesman Survivor Loki|Thor]], although he was pruned by the [[Time Variance Authority]] and sent to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], where he joined [[Kid Loki's Crew]]. After meeting another [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] and [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]], he sacrificed his life to save them by distracting [[Alioth]], who then consumed him. ==Biography== ===God of Mischief=== ====Faking His Death==== {{Quote|In my [[Statesman Survivor Loki Universe|timeline]], everything proceeded correctly, my entire life, until [[Thanos/Statesman Survivor Loki|Thanos]] [[Attack on the Statesman/Statesman Survivor Loki|attacked]] our [[Statesman|ship]]."
"So, you didn't try to stab him?"
"Certainly not.|Classic Loki and [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]|Journey Into Mystery}} Loki's life was exactly the same as his [[Loki|original timeline counterpart]], up until when [[Thanos/Statesman Survivor Loki|Thanos]] boarded the ''[[Statesman]]''. In this timeline, Loki diverged from the main timeline of his original self, who had his neck snapped by [[Thanos]] after he attempted to stab Thanos with his [[Loki's Blades|dagger]]. Instead, Loki used his [[magic]] to cast an illusion of himself while he hid as inanimate debris. His illusion was subsequently killed in his place as Thanos destroyed the ''Statesman''. Now drifting through space, with Thanos and [[Thor/Statesman Survivor Loki|Thor]] believing he was dead, Loki thought about his place in the universe and how he caused pain and suffering to everyone he came across. Feeling remorse for his actions, Loki exiled himself on an isolated planet, believing that he was making a positive change by removing himself from the world. After many years, he found himself missing [[Asgard]] and his brother, and decided to end his exile and reunite with Thor.{{Ref|LK105}} ====Arrested by the TVA==== However, his attempt to end his isolation would cause his timeline to deviate from the established baseline of the [[Sacred Timeline]], therefore, he was immediately arrested by the [[Time Variance Authority]], who pruned him and his reality which sent him to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]. There, he met [[Boastful Loki]], [[Kid Loki]] and [[Alligator Loki]], and accepted Kid Loki as their king as the group continuously fled from [[Alioth]].{{Ref|LK105}} ===Trapped in the Void=== ====Meeting Alternate Self==== [[File:The Tree Amigos.png|{{AltFloat}}|Classic Loki introduces himself to [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]]] {{Quote|Is [[Void (End of Time)|this]]... [[Hel]]? Am I dead?"
"Not yet. But you will be unless you come with us.|[[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] and Classic Loki|The Nexus Event}} While in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], Classic Loki, along with [[Kid Loki]], [[Boastful Loki]], and [[Alligator Loki]] came across a [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki Variant]]. When Loki asked if he was in [[Hel]], Classic Loki said no, but he should come with them if he wanted to live.{{Ref|LK104}} [[File:Vfd1060 105 comp v020 20210609 r709.1112 r.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Classic Loki listening to [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]'s questions]] After walking around with Loki for a long time to take them to their [[Loki Palace|hiding place]], Loki began to question while screaming why he had never tried to escape from the Void before, which caused [[Alioth]] to hear them and the other Lokis to shut Loki up to avoid getting noticed. Loki later told them that they could plan an escape, but Classic Loki told him that that it was impossible, since he had already tried many times before. [[File:Classic Loki tells his story.png|{{AltFloat}}|Classic Loki telling his own story to [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]]] The Lokis led Loki to their hiding place to be safe from Alioth. The group entered through a secret bunker protected by a metal door. Upon arrival, Classic Loki questioned why he longed so much to return to the [[Time Variance Authority]], to which Loki replied by saying that it was his "Glorious purpose". The group of Lokis began to tell their stories and how they were pruned. Classic Loki heard how [[Boastful Loki]] bragged and deceived the others, claiming that he had murdered [[Hub:Steve Rogers|Captain America]] and [[Hub:Tony Stark|Iron Man]], and then took the [[Infinity Stones]]. After hearing Boastful Loki's false story, Classic Loki was hesitant to recall his own Nexus Event but relented in response to a curious Loki, who pointed out that Thanos was supposed to kill them after [[Ragnarök]]. Once Classic Loki's story was at its end, he held a toast to the one part all Lokis had to play: God of Outcasts.{{Ref|LK105}} ====[[Ambush at the Loki Palace|Betrayed by Boastful Loki]]==== {{Quote|You bastard! You led the wolves to our door.|Classic Loki to [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]|Journey Into Mystery}} When [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] decided to leave the group to go on his own to assassinate [[Alioth]] he tried to motivate them to accompany him, without success as Classic Loki and the others laughed at the idea of facing Alioth. However, just as Loki was about to leave, a troop of bandits led by [[President Loki]] appeared in front of him and cornered the group. [[File:Vlp5020 105 comp v007.1034 r 0.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Classic Loki sees that the bandits found them]] Classic Loki at first reprimanded Loki, believing that he lured the gang to them, but [[Boastful Loki]] revealed himself to be the culprit for the attack, explaining that he agreed with President Loki to keep the throne of [[Kid Loki]], in exchange for shelter and food. [[Alligator Loki]] then appeared on the scene and attacked President Loki, completely ripping off his hand, thus initiating a fight between all the Lokis. Observing the destruction of his [[Loki Palace|hiding place]], Classic Loki decided to create illusions of him, Kid Loki, Alligator Loki, and Loki to distract the others in order to escape, using a portal created by himself to leave the place.{{Ref|LK105}} ====Going After Alioth==== [[File:Three Lokis watch Alioth destroy the USS Eldridge.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Classic Loki watches how [[Alioth]] consumes a ship]] After fleeing the battle of the Lokis, [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] continued to persuade them to help him escape the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] and reach the [[TVA]]. [[Kid Loki]] then accepted, so Classic Loki followed and reluctantly accepted but he warned him that they would only help him get to [[Alioth]], but not face him, since that would be suicide. Arriving close to Alioth, Loki commented on the idea of his plan, to enter Alioth, find its center and stab it. Suddenly, the {{WPS|USS Eldridge}} appeared in front of them, taking advantage of it as an experiment to prove their theory. However, Classic Loki and the others watched as Alioth totally devoured the ship and killed every one of the crew in mere seconds. [[File:Classic Loki rests before going after Alioth again.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Classic Loki speaking with [[Mobius M. Mobius]]]] Classic Loki and the rest began to question their decision to go after Alioth. A car then started to head towards them, from which came [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]], a female Variant of Loki, and [[Mobius M. Mobius]], a former TVA agent. Loki introduced Classic Loki, Kid Loki, and [[Alligator Loki]] to the new prunees. After discussing how they would face Alioth, Laufeydottir finally agreed to go to enchant him and thus find the man who had created the TVA to defeat him. The group settled in an abandoned warehouse to plan their next move, where Mobius denied having captured an alligator Variant of Loki before, questioning whether it was really a Variant of Loki. After Kid Loki asked him what he would do after returning to TVA, Mobius replied that he wishes everyone there knew the truth, stating that it is never too late to change oneself, making Classic Loki reflect on his current situation.{{Ref|LK105}} ====Honorable Sacrifice==== {{Quote|Glorious purpose!|Classic Loki|Journey Into Mystery}} The group again gathered on a cliff in front of [[Alioth]], ready to destroy him. [[Sylvie Laufeydottir|Sylvie]] and [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] planned to get close to Alioth to enchant him. However, as Classic Loki said, he was only going to take them to Alioth, so he said goodbye to his Variants and left the place along with [[Kid Loki]] and [[Alligator Loki]]. [[File:C517D159-213F-4817-BD13-10D75DF0DC17.jpeg|{{AltFloat}}|Classic Loki recreates [[Asgard]] via an illusion]] Later Classic Loki observed Loki and Laufeydottir battling Alioth, he also saw how Loki was going to use himself as a distraction. After watching as Laufeydottir was nearly eaten, Classic Loki began to help them, using the full potential of his power to create a perfect magical illusion of [[Asgard]] in order to distract Alioth enough so that the other two Lokis gained the upper hand. [[File:Journey Into Mystery 10.png|{{AltFloat}}|Classic Loki sacrifices himself]] After using his maximum power and due to his advanced age, Classic Loki began to weaken to such a degree that he collapsed his mega illusion, which allowed Alioth to enter his perimeter. Before he was eaten, Classic Loki recalled Mobius's words, rediscovering that it is never too late to change and gain his glorious purpose. Alioth's toxic cloud approached Classic Loki, who could only smile and laugh maniacally, knowing that he would sacrifice himself for the greater good.{{Ref|LK105}} {{Clear}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Frost Giant Physiology''': Classic Loki was a [[Frost Giant]] who had been enchanted to look like an [[Asgardian]]. Due to his heritage, Classic Loki possessed all of the various superhuman attributes common among his people, including superhuman strength, durability, stamina, and was extremely long-lived. **'''Superhuman Strength''': Like all Frost Giants, Classic Loki possessed great superhuman strength. However, he was not able to overpower the much stronger [[Thanos/Statesman Survivor Loki|Thanos]]. **'''Superhuman Durability''': Classic Loki was able to survive in the vacuum of space after the ''[[Statesman]]'' explosion. **'''Superhuman Stamina''': Classic Loki was able to perform his magic for a long time without tiring, allowing [[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] and [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] enough time to enchant [[Alioth]]. **'''Longevity''': Classic Loki, like all other Frost Giants, were extremely long-lived beings, being able to live for thousands of years. He lived for centuries on a desolate planet until he missed [[Thor/Statesman Survivor Loki|Thor]] and decided to leave, causing him to have a nexus event. {{Quote|Take no offense, my friends, but blades are worthless in the face of a Loki sorcery.|Classic Loki|Journey Into Mystery}} *'''[[Magic]]''': Classic Loki is a powerful and skilled sorcerer, capable of using [[magic]] to produce various effects. Classic Loki was a master Asgardian sorcerer who specialized in trickery. Unlike other Variants however, Classic Loki placed more emphasis on his sorcery than his bladework and was therefore a far more powerful wizard than an average Loki. His magical feats were looked upon by others as seemingly impossible, and other Lokis believed his sorcerous skills to be the pinnacle of what a Loki could be capable of. Therefore, his magic seems to be far more developed than the other Variants as he was able to create a massive illusion of Asgard to fool Alioth. **'''Illusion Manipulation''': [[File:AB2FD1B7-8CE8-4642-8AAD-48BA512E62AC.jpeg|thumb|250px|Classic Loki recreates [[Asgard]] via an illusion]] Classic Loki can generate extremely detailed images from outside oneself, which are perceptible in the external world. The illusions of this Loki are stronger than those of the other Lokis because he managed to create such a realistic illusion that he managed to fool Thanos from his timeline before hiding as inanimate debris. His strength is so great that he was even able to make duplicates of his allies that could contend with other Lokis in battle. He even managed to create a large-scale illusion of Asgard with which he mumbled Alioth long enough for Loki and Laufeydottir to thrall him. **'''Decoy Manipulation''': Classic Loki was capable of conjuring duplicates of living entities that could interact with their environment. He created duplicates of himself, his [[Loki/New York Time Heist|time-traveller counterpart]], [[Kid Loki]], and [[Alligator Loki]] to fight and distract the hostile Lokis. **'''Presence Manipulation''': Classic Loki was able to render himself and others unseen and unheard to whomever he wanted. This effect could be achieved both through him creating the illusion of letting light waves pass through himself or as simply a trick of the mind, similar to hypnosis. **'''Portal Creation''': [[File:Classic Loki Does a Poof.jpeg|thumb|250px|Classic Loki creates a portal]] Classic Loki was able to create portals that allowed him to travel from one place to another in an instant. These manifest as a green mist that allow him and others to instantly move from one area of space to another. As demonstrated by his inability to escape the Void, Classic Loki's teleportation only allowed him to travel through space and not through time. **'''Telekinesis''': Classic Loki was able to influence objects and move matter with mere gestures and focus. He notably was able to open the door to the underground bunker where the Lokis were hiding with a wave of his hand, briefly causing it to glow green. **'''Energy Blast''': [[File:Classic Loki Blasting.jpeg|thumb|250px|Classic Loki blasts away his counterpart]] Classic Loki could project green energy bolts and blasts, allowing him to strike, push, or blow away his targets. The blasts were powerful enough to repel and stun other Lokis. Such was his mastery of this skill he could even cast energy blasts through his projections, though with reduced accuracy. He blasted [[Military Loki]] during the [[Ambush at the Loki Palace]]. ===Abilities=== {{Quote|That's alligator for growling and saying 'liar' at the same time.|Classic Loki|Journey Into Mystery}} *'''Bilingualism''': Classic Loki was fluent in English and Alligator. ==Equipment== {{Quote|Why do you wear the [[Horned Helmet|horns]]? You let a [[Kid Loki|child]] command you.|[[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] to Classic Loki|Journey Into Mystery}} *'''[[Horned Helmet]]''': Classic Loki possesses a golden horned helmet. ==Facilities== *'''[[Loki Palace]]''': While in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], Classic Loki lived in the [[Loki Palace]] next to [[Kid Loki]], [[Alligator Loki]] and [[Boastful Loki]]. *'''[[Dom's Cuts]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Thor/Statesman Survivor Loki|Thor]] - Adoptive Brother ===Allies=== *[[Kid Loki's Crew]] - Alternate Selves **[[Kid Loki]] - Leader **[[Alligator Loki]] **[[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] *[[Sylvie Laufeydottir]] - Alternate Self *[[Mobius M. Mobius]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Thanos/Statesman Survivor Loki|Thanos]] - Attempted Killer *[[Time Variance Authority]] *[[Alioth]] - Killer *[[Loki Bandits]] - Alternate Selves **[[President Loki]] **[[Mustache Loki]] **[[Glamshades Loki]] **[[Bicycle Loki]] **[[Pokey Loki]] **[[Warrior Loki]] **[[Ninja Loki]] **[[Assassin Loki]] **[[Goth Loki]] **[[Military Loki]] *[[Boastful Loki]] - Alternate Self and Former Ally {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|LK104}} *{{Appearance|LK105}} **{{Appearance|LK106}} (voice) ==Trivia== *Classic Loki's outfit is a reference to Loki's original one from the Prime [[Marvel Comics (publisher)|Marvel Comics]], as designed by {{WPS|Jack Kirby}}, [[Stan Lee]], and the latter's brother, [[Larry Lieber]]. ==Behind the Scenes== *''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]'' writer [[Michael Waldron]] conceived the Classic Loki character upon asking what would have happened had [[Loki]] survived the events of ''[[Avengers: Infinity War]]'' and speculating how Loki would have aged.[https://www.marvel.com/amp/articles/tv-shows/meet-the-other-lokis-classic-kid-boastful-alligator Meet the Other Lokis in Marvel Studios’ ‘Loki’] *[[Dave Cutler]] was a stunt double for [[Richard E. Grant]] in the role of Classic Loki. ==References== {{Gallery|Classic Loki/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Loki}} *{{WP|Loki (Marvel Comics)|Loki}} [[es:Loki Clásico]] [[ru:Классический Локи]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Loki (TV series) Characters]] [[Category:Legends Characters]] [[Category:Frost Giants]] [[Category:Genderfluid Characters]] [[Category:Gray Hair]] [[Category:Blue Eyes]] [[Category:Royalty]] [[Category:Sorcerers]] [[Category:Asgardian Royal Family Members/Statesman Survivor Loki]] [[Category:Kid Loki's Crew Members]] [[Category:Variants Monitored by the TVA]] [[Category:Gods]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]] [[Category:LGBTQIA+ Characters]] [[Category:Pruned]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Alioth]]

Prince of Asgard (formerly)
King of Asgard (formerly)
